title: Chat Coords
description: Share your coords in the chat easy!
body:
# Chat Coords

[![Discord](https://img.shields.io/discord/1327308441324097681?label=discord&color=blue&logo=discord)](https://discord.gg/5UdcDa5xNC)
[![Modrinth](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/ly-chat-coords?label=modrinth&logo=modrinth)](https://modrinth.com/datapack/chat-coords)
[![License](https://img.shields.io/github/license/lullaby6/data-packs)](https://github.com/lullaby6/data-packs/blob/main/LICENSE)

## 📖 Description

Share your coords in the chat easy with a command or with the Quick Actions!

## 🔥 Usage

Use the Quick Actions key (G) to see the gui or do the command `/trigger chat_coords`!

![Overworld](https://i.imgur.com/E4b9DhM.png)

## 🪪 License

[AGPL-3.0-or-later](https://github.com/lullaby6/data-packs/blob/main/LICENSE)

## 👾 Bugs/Issues

Please report any problem/bug/issues in the [Discord Server](https://discord.gg/5UdcDa5xNC).
